The goal is to have your partner guess all of your team's words based on the clues you give them, before the other team has uncovered all of theirs. TARGETS: <TARGETS>

Distractor words are: decentralization, plurality, unconstitutionality, moviegoer, categorization, lightheadedness, tragicomedy.
The kill words are: backwardness.
